about.label: Get to know me
about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: A developer passionate about creating robust and elegant solutions.
about.description1: I'm Francisco Guadarrama, a Computer Systems Engineer with over 5 years of experience in full-stack web development. My focus is on creating, maintaining, and optimizing large-scale enterprise applications.
about.description2: Specialized in modernizing legacy systems and building new robust solutions, I master both backend (Laravel, Node.js) and modern frontend (React, Angular). I'm passionate about clean code, scalability, and helping teams achieve ambitious tech goals.

experience.label: Trajectory
experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: Over 5 years building and optimizing enterprise applications.
experience.desc1: Maintaining and modernizing a real estate CRM system, resolving bugs and refactoring legacy code using Laravel and Angular. Implemented modern best practices and built a Node.js microservice for Meta lead capture integration. Working with Azure and CI/CD pipelines.
experience.role2: Full-Stack Web Developer | One Way Consulting
experience.desc2: Developed a point-of-sale system integrated with the SAP Business One SDK. Upgraded legacy code to modern framework versions and applied best practices. Worked with Laravel, Angular, Yii2, Docker, and AWS services (EC2, S3).
experience.desc3: Developed executive dashboards and reporting tools integrated with SAP systems. Backend development with Laravel and Node.js, frontend with React. Implemented Docker containerization for deployment workflows.

projects.label: Portfolio
projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Projects developed for federal institutions in climate-related initiatives.

project1.title: National Climate Financing Platform
project1.description: Contributed to the development of a web-based tool to identify supply and demand for climate financing supporting adaptation and mitigation programs in Mexico, aligned with the Paris Agreement. Technologies: Laravel, Angular, MySQL, REST APIs.

project2.title: Climate Action Identification and Quantification System
project2.description: Contributed to the development of a system for the integration of the Climate Change Cross-Cutting Annex. Backend built in Laravel and frontend in Angular. Addressed large datasets, complex mathematical formulas, and advanced validation logic. Published in the Official Gazette of the Federation (siatsubnacional.semarnat.gob.mx).

skills.label: My Arsenal
skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: A modern and diverse toolkit to build the future of the web.

contact.label: Let's Talk
contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Do you have a project in mind or want to modernize your infrastructure? I'm ready to collaborate.
